title: The Energy Innovation Imperative: Addressing Oil Dependence, Climate Change, and Other 21st Century Energy Challenges
summary: Society faces many energy challenges in this century, but "running out" of energy resources in a global or absolute sense is not one of them.
body: Society faces many energy challenges in this century, but "running out" of energy resources in a global or absolute sense is not one of them.
